articles.description: After three straight defeats and a backline overhaul for the loss to Italy, England head coach Steve Borthwick may make major changes for the trip to France.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Steve Borthwick - four big calls that could revive England

articles.description: The Miami Dolphins are to release quarterback Tua Tagovailoa, which will cost them a record dead cap hit of $99.2m (£74.2m).
articles.title: Tua Tagovailoa: Miami Dolphins to release quarterback and suffer NFL record dead cap hit

articles.description: Wolves are bottom of the Premier League, 12 points off safety. But two wins in a row have raised faint hopes that they could survive relegation.
articles.title: Could Wolves pull off Premier League's greatest escape?

articles.description: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Max Verstappen will tick off one of his "bucket list" events when he drives in May's Nurburgring 24-Hours endurance race.
articles.title: Formula 1: Max Verstappen to compete in 24-hour Nurburgring race

articles.description: After ugly scenes at Sunday's Old Firm derby, what do we know about the fan clashes and what could happen next?
articles.title: Old Firm chaos: What happened? Who said what? What now?

articles.description: Iraq head coach Graham Arnold wants Iraq's World Cup play-off decider to be rescheduled to the week before the tournament to give his side a fair chance of qualifying.
articles.title: World Cup: Iraq coach wants play-off to be postponed amid US-Israeli war with Iran

articles.description: "It's regrettable," says former Brazil forward Hulk after becoming one of 23 players are sent off following a mass brawl between Cruzeiro and Atletico Mineiro.
articles.title: 23 players see red card after mass brawl in Brazilian cup final between Cruzeiro and Atletico Mineiro

articles.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.
articles.title: Iran football team: Australia urged to protect Lionesses after elimination at Asian Cup

articles.description: Manchester City midfielder Rodri is fined for saying the referee was not "neutral" in last month's Premier League draw at Tottenham.
articles.title: Rodri: Man City defender fined £80,000 for referee comments

articles.description: Scotland will be without first-choice second-row pair Gregor Brown and Scott Cummings, winger Duhan van der Merwe and three others in Dublin.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Six Scotland players ruled out of potentially decisive Ireland match
